ref: But Abram answered, “Lord All-Powerful, you have given me everything I could ask for, except children. And when I die, Eliezer of Damascus will get all I own.
text: Na Abram bisaa sɛ: AWURADE Nyankopɔn, ɛdeɛn na wode bɛma me? Menni ba na menam, na deɛ ɔbɛdi m’adeɛ ne Damaskoni Eliesa anaa?
translated: And Abram asked: LORD God, what will you give me? I have no child and inherit, and the one who will inherit me is Eliezer of Damascus?

ref: and wandering through the fields, when a man asked, “What are you looking for?”
text: Na ɔbarima bi hunuu no, na hwɛ, na ɔrewɔ wira no mu ntwɛtwɛdɛ. Na ɔbarima no bisaa no sɛ: Worehwehwɛ deɛn?
translated: And a man saw him, and looked, and he was weaving in the midst of the dance. And the man asked him: What are you looking for?

ref: You and this woman will hate each other; your descendants and hers will always be enemies. One of hers will strike you on the head, and you will strike him on the heel.”
text: Na mede ɔtan bɛto wo ne ɔbaa no ntam, ɛne w’asefoɔ ne n’asefoɔ ntam; ɔno na ɔbɛbɔ wo tire, na wo nso woaka ne nantin.
translated: And I will put enmity between you and the woman, and between your offspring and hers; he will strike your head, and you will strike his heel.

ref: But your son will live far from his relatives; he will be like a wild donkey, fighting everyone, and everyone fighting him.”
text: Na ɔbɛyɛ onipa a ɔte sɛ ɛserɛ so afunumu. Ne nsa bɛtia nnipa nyinaa, na nnipa nyinaa nsa atia no, na ɔbɛsɔre atia ne nuanom nyinaa.
translated: And he will become a person who is like a thorn in the flesh. His hands will be against everyone, and everyone's hands will be against him, and he will live in hostility toward all his brothers.

ref: Then the Lord God said to the woman, “You will suffer terribly when you give birth. But you will still desire your husband, and he will rule over you.”
text: Ɔbaa no deɛ, ɔka kyerɛɛ no sɛ: Dɔ na mɛma wo yea ne wo nyinsɛn mu brɛ adɔɔso. Yea mu na wobɛwo mma, na w’ani bɛgyina wo kunu, na ɔno na ɔbɛdi wo soɔ.
translated: The woman said to her, "Love is what I will give you to build a home with your husband. In love, you will bear children, and your eyes will be fixed on your husband, and he will cherish you."

text: Fa me yerenom ne me mma a wɔn nti mesomm woɔ no ma me. Wo ara wonim me som a masom woɔ.
translated: Take my wives and children because of whom I worship you for me. You alone know my worship that I worship you.

ref: Jacob said, “I have seen God face to face, and I am still alive.” So he named the place Peniel.
text: Na Yakob too ɛhɔ din Peni-el, ɛfiri sɛ ɔse: Me ne Onyankopɔn adi nhunuanimu, nso me kra anya nkwa.
translated: And Jacob called the place Peniel, saying, "I have seen God face to face, and my life has been preserved."

ref: So God created humans to be like himself; he made men and women.
text: Na Onyankopɔn bɔɔ onipa wɔ ne suban so. Aane, Nyankopɔn suban so na ɔbɔɔ no, ɔbarima ne ɔbaa na ɔbɔɔ wɔn.
translated: And God created man in his own image. Yes, in the image of God he created him, male and female he created them.

ref: Store up enough food both for yourself and for them.
text: Na wo deɛ, boaboa aduane nyinaa bi ano kɔ mu, na ayɛ wo ne wɔn aduane.
translated: And with that, gather all the food together, and it became your and their food.

ref: Abraham, from now on your wife's name will be Sarah instead of Sarai.
text: Na Onyankopɔn ka kyerɛɛ Abraham sɛ: Wo yere Sarai deɛ, mfrɛ no Sarai bio, na mmom Sara.
translated: And God said to Abraham: As for your wife Sarai, you shall no longer call her Sarai, but Sarah.

ref: You know how hard I've worked for you, so let me take my wives and children and leave.”
text: Fa me yerenom ne me mma a wɔn nti mesomm woɔ no ma me. Wo ara wonim me som a masom woɔ.
translated: Take my wives and children because of whom I serve you for me. You know my service that I served you.

ref: Jacob said, “I have seen God face to face, and I am still alive.” So he named the place Peniel.

translated: And Jacob named the place Peniel, saying, "I have seen God face to face, and my soul has been saved."
